emails.subject: Re: Pacific Gas & Electric Company
emails.body: Re: Pacific Gas Electric Company Getting back to the original questions. Do you trade with this counterparty and do you trade pursuant to a master or a GTC?

emails.subject: Re: Pacific Gas & Electric Company
emails.body: Re: Pacific Gas Electric Company Getting back to the original questions. Do you trade with this counterparty and do you trade pursuant to a master or a GTC?

emails.subject: Re: Pacific Gas & Electric Company
emails.body: I do not know. The master was worked as a follow-up to what Christian Yoder had started with PG&E, no input from the desk. They wanted one contract for both Enron Canada and Enron North America. I told the person at PG&E that we needed separate contracts and that I would only be able to help with the Enron North America contract. The contact with Enron Canada was to be Peter Koehane. I believe that Peter already had and Canadian version of the Enfolio in place. Please ask someone at the West Desk if they trade under the contract. Tana Jones 08/01/2000 11:01 AM
